pattern_library_hooks.matching_rule: If requirement_normalized.plan_pattern_id matches a pattern with deterministic=true AND pattern.parallelizable=true, prefer parallel execution.

invariants.isolation: Each workstream executes in an isolated git worktree; no shared mutable filesystem state.
invariants.single_writer: Only control checkout may write global state/registries; workers are forbidden from global writes.
invariants.delta_only_workers: Workers emit deltas/patches and evidence; integration applies deltas in control checkout.
invariants.explicit_scope: Each workstream declares read/write sets and exclusive resources before scheduling.
invariants.declared_write_enforcement: Actual touched files must be a subset of declared writes; violations fail the run.
invariants.completion_by_evidence: Work is complete only when required evidence artifacts exist and mandatory gates pass.

placeholders.{run_id}: The orchestrator-assigned run identifier for the overall execution.
placeholders.{worktree_id}: Identifier of the provisioned git worktree.

artifact_interpolation.rendering_rule: All placeholders must be resolved prior to execution; unresolved placeholders are a hard failure (preflight).

conflict_if: declared_writes overlap on directory prefix (when directory write claims are used)
both touch global_state and global_state_writer is single-writer
dependency_edges: A produces artifact consumed by B
A writes a resource read by B AND ordering required
algorithm_spec.output: conflict_graph.json with nodes=workstreams and edges=conflicts or dependencies; plus parallel_groups.json derived by topological layering.

merge_strategy.ordering_rule: Apply deltas in topological order of the dependency graph; within a layer, apply in stable lexical order by workstream_id.
merge_strategy.rollback_rule: Create rollback snapshot tag before applying any deltas; on any failure, reset to snapshot and emit rollback_actions.json.

scheduler_policy.serialization_rule: Any workstream with conflicts must be scheduled after its predecessors (no same-layer execution).

core.description: Minimum viable deterministic parallel execution (no golden fixtures required).

full.description: Full determinism proof with golden fixtures and registry reconciliation.

gates.mapping_note: Gate IDs here correspond to entries added to architecture.system_layers.layer_2_validation.components[1].gate_registry.

value.action: Optional: execute parallel workstreams with git worktrees
tasks: Run preflight gates in order: GATE-PWE-001..GATE-PWE-005
Execute workstreams concurrently by parallel groups (scheduler_policy)
Run per-workstream enforcement and evidence gates: GATE-PWE-007..GATE-PWE-008
Integrate deltas in control checkout: GATE-PWE-009..GATE-PWE-010
Finalize determinism and registry reconciliation: GATE-PWE-011..GATE-PWE-012

value.name: Parallel Workstream Schema Validate
value.purpose: Validate parallel_workstream_execution section against schema and required fields.

value.name: Write Manifest Validate
value.purpose: Validate per-workstream write manifests against schema and policy.

value.name: Conflict Graph Build
value.purpose: Compute deterministic conflict graph/DAG from declared writes and exclusive resources.

value.name: Parallel Group Authorization
value.purpose: Authorize parallel groups from conflict graph; enforce disjoint write/exclusive sets.

value.name: Worktree Provision
value.purpose: Provision isolated git worktrees deterministically; emit worktree map.

value.name: Workstream Execute
value.purpose: Execute each workstream inside its worktree; produce deltas and execution report.

value.name: Declared Writes Enforcement
value.purpose: Enforce actual touched files subset of declared writes; fail on violations.

value.name: Evidence Bundle Validate
value.purpose: Build and validate evidence bundle for each workstream.

value.name: Integration Apply Deltas
value.purpose: Apply deltas/patches in control checkout with deterministic ordering; emit integration report.

value.name: Rollback On Failure
value.purpose: Rollback control checkout to snapshot on any integration failure; emit rollback actions.

value.name: Registry Rebuild And Reconcile
value.purpose: Rebuild derived registries/indexes from inventory; reconcile and validate invariants.

value.name: Final Determinism Validate
value.purpose: Validate end-to-end determinism (canonicalization, toolchain lock, stable ordering, reproducible hashes).

details: If your gate dependency graph is materialized in scripts/gate_dependencies.json, add nodes/edges for the GATE-PWE-* gates
Mark these gates as conditional on parallel_workstream_execution.enabled

value: Registry mapping required files to producing/consuming gates, schemas, and evidence outputs for Parallel Workstream Execution.
